# Transcrição: 8. PAYMENT CLOSE - I AM SURPRISED YOU SAY THAT

## [00:00 - 00:15]

Hey, the payments are too high and you're going to act surprised and say this, you've got to be kidding. You're shocking me. I'm surprised to hear that from you. You appear to be the type of person that could afford whatever they want when they want it. Come on man, let's do this.
